case_title: SHANNAH FINKEL ET AL VS. DENIS MCMAHON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF UPDATING COURT WITH DEFENDANT'S MAILING ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINKEL, SHANNAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS SHANNAH FINKEL AND SIYABONGA MATCHABA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENIS MCMAHON IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS HEARING SET FOR MAR-13-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO FEB-23-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-16-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS SHANNAH FINKEL AND SIYABONGA MATHABA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINKEL, SHANNAH
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-15-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-18-2024 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINKEL, SHANNAH MATCHABA, SIYABONGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS $2,786.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,786.00, PLAINTIFF SHOWED DEFENDANT IN BAD FAITH VIOLATED CIVIL CODE S1950.5 AND THIS WAS OWED DOUBLE THE AMOUNT OF THE DEPOSIT IMPROPERLY HELD - NOT INCLUDED WAS INTEREST AND EXTRA DAY RENT IN THIS AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DENIS MCMAHON IS GRANTED. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF SHANNA FINKEL APPEARED. PLAINTIFF SIYABONGA MATCHABA APPEARED VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT DENIS MCMAHON APPEARED. DEFENDANT WAS GIVEN A COPY OF SC-100 IN COURT AND WAIVES FURTHER SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FINKEL, SHANNAH MATCHABA, SIYABONGA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS $4,087.51 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,202.51, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT RETAINED THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN BAD FAITH AND IS NOT CREDIBLE. ONE (1) DAY OF DAILY RENTAL RATE WAS OFFSET/DEDUCTED FROM THE AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,196.00 FILED BY FINKEL, SHANNAH MATCHABA, SIYABONGA AS TO DEFENDANT MCMAHON, DENIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
